title: Show Folks
writer: John W. Krafft, Jack Jungmeyer, George Dromgold
actors: Eddie Quillan, Lina Basquette, Carole Lombard
plot: Eddie Kehoe is a young vaudeville hoofer who thinks his inability to hit the big time is the fault of stage managers, agents, musicians...everybody but himself. Eddie likes to tell others how good he is, but seldom shows them. Kit...
